notes: SHIP v1.14.264 - RACK GESTURE LOCK (per RULING-RACK-GESTURE-LOCK.md; reh3d 3D canvas). Rack orbit is SIDE-TO-SIDE ONLY; vertical swipes over the canvas now scroll the PAGE natively (released, not a dead zone). FIVE edits in rackElevation_render3D: (1) canvas touch-action none->pan-y (CSS primary: vertical=native scroll, app owns horizontal+pinch; audited - pinch is the app camera zoom via JS, so NOT pinch-zoom in touch-action); (2) direction lock: on touchstart axis=undecided, on the first ~8px |dx|>|dy|->claim orbit+preventDefault, else release (no preventDefault, no camera write -> page scrolls), committed until touchend, no mid-gesture switch; (3) elevation writer KILLED at source (removed the tElev vertical-tilt assignment in onMove) - elev stays 0.18 (CLEAR-PORT S1 default, device-confirm); (4) touchmove passive true->false so it can preventDefault the claimed horizontal orbit + pinch (touchstart stays passive:true); (5) mouse vertical now no-ops (onMove writes theta only), wheel zoom unchanged. PRESERVED: horizontal orbit feel/damping; pinch camera zoom + clamp (0.55-1.7); tap-to-select (clean tap <8px keeps axis 0 -> raycast; vertical scroll sets moved=true so it never mis-selects; existing 11px tap threshold kept); U-map scrubber untouched (owns its own touches). reh3d-only -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical; forge3d untouched. Gates: node --check 4/0; CSS balanced; NUL 0; ctrl unchanged; three-stamp .263->.264. NOT device-verified - John iPhone gate (esp. no dead zone, native momentum, clean taps still select).
